image:image.image:title: Tamarind Farm Stay — Laurie Baker inspired villa in Trivandrum
image:image.image:caption: Brick farmhouse and tropical garden at Tamarind, an eco-friendly farm stay in Vilappilsala near Trivandrum, Kerala.

image:image.image:title: Open living hall with exposed brick walls
image:image.image:caption: Open living hall with exposed brick walls and filler slabs at Tamarind farm stay.

image:image.image:title: Indoor stone dip pool at Tamarind
image:image.image:caption: Small indoor stone dip pool and waterfall inside the Tamarind villa, Trivandrum — meant for soaking, not swimming laps.

image:image.image:title: Morning light through a Baker jali brick screen
image:image.image:caption: Morning light streaming through a Baker jali brick screen onto the indoor dip pool.

image:image.image:title: Cosy bedroom at Tamarind farm villa
image:image.image:caption: Cosy bedroom with cotton linens and brick walls in the 3-bedroom Tamarind villa.

image:image.image:title: Reading loft with timber roof beams
image:image.image:caption: Reading loft with timber roof beams in the Tamarind farm villa, Vilappilsala.

image:image.image:title: 32-cent fruit plantation at Tamarind
image:image.image:caption: Fruit plantation and private garden surrounding Tamarind farm stay in Vilappilsala.

image:image.image:title: Curved brick staircase at Tamarind
image:image.image:caption: Curved brick staircase and lush green surroundings at the Tamarind farmhouse.

image:image.image:title: Traditional Kerala breakfast at Tamarind
image:image.image:caption: Authentic Kerala breakfast served on the patio at Tamarind farm stay.
